=============================================================================
TIMELINE: SESSION DUPLICATION BUG
=============================================================================

T0: USER CLICKS "HEAVY SESSION" BUTTON \(1st time\)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  Frontend: POST /api/terminals
  Backend:
    в”њв”Ђ Create SSH PTY
    в””в”Ђ Call createTerminalSession\(terminalId="UUID-1", config\)
       в”њв”Ђ Create session object: { sessionId: "UUID-1", status: "connecting", ... }
       в”њв”Ђ sessions.set\("UUID-1", session\)
       в””в”Ђ broadcast\({ type: "session_update", session }\)
  
  Frontend \(first browser\):
    в”њв”Ђ Receives session_update with sessionId="UUID-1"
    в”њв”Ђ allSessions["UUID-1"] = session  вњ“

  IndexedDB \(browser\):
    в”њв”Ђ persistSessionUpdate\(session\) called by wsClient
    в””в”Ђ put\('sessions', { id: "UUID-1", status: "connecting", ... }\)
       в””в”Ђ IndexedDB now has: { id: "UUID-1", ... }

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

T1: USER CLICKS "HEAVY SESSION" BUTTON \(2nd time\)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  Similar to T0:
  Backend:
    в””в”Ђ createTerminalSession\(terminalId="UUID-2", config\)
       в””в”Ђ sessions.set\("UUID-2", session\)
  
  Frontend:
    в””в”Ђ Card 2 "connecting" appears
  
  IndexedDB:
    в””в”Ђ put\('sessions', { id: "UUID-2", status: "connecting", ... }\)
       в””в”Ђ IndexedDB now has: { "UUID-1", "UUID-2" }
  
  Display: 2 cards \(correct!\)

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

T2: HOOK ARRIVES FROM CLAUDE \(1st session\)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  Claude CLI sends: {
    session_id: "CLAUDE-ID-1" \(different UUID!\),
    agent_terminal_id: "UUID-1",
    hook_event_name: "SessionStart",
    ...
  }
  
  Backend \(sessionStore.js:handleEvent\):
    в”њв”Ђ Check: sessions.get\("UUID-1"\) в†’ exists вњ“
    в”њв”Ђ Re-key logic:
    в”‚  в”њв”Ђ preSession = sessions.get\("UUID-1"\)
    в”‚  в”њв”Ђ sessions.delete\("UUID-1"\)  в†ђ REMOVE old terminal session
    в”‚  в”њв”Ђ preSession.sessionId = "CLAUDE-ID-1"
    в”‚  в”њв”Ђ preSession.replacesId = "UUID-1"  в†ђ FLAG for deduping
    в”‚  в””в”Ђ sessions.set\("CLAUDE-ID-1", preSession\)  в†ђ ADD under new key
    в”‚
    в””в”Ђ broadcast\({ type: "session_update", session, replacesId: "UUID-1" }\)
  
  Frontend:
    в”њв”Ђ Receives session_update with replacesId: "UUID-1"
    в”њв”Ђ onSessionUpdateCb \(app.js:139\):
    в”‚  в”њв”Ђ if \(session.replacesId\) {
    в”‚  в”‚   delete allSessions["UUID-1"]  вњ“ REMOVE old
    в”‚  в”‚   removeCard\("UUID-1"\)  вњ“
    в”‚  в”‚   robotManager.removeRobot\("UUID-1"\)  вњ“
    в”‚  в”‚ }
    в”‚  в”њв”Ђ allSessions["CLAUDE-ID-1"] = session  вњ“ ADD new
    в”‚  в””в”Ђ createOrUpdateCard\("CLAUDE-ID-1"\)  вњ“
    в”‚
    в””в”Ђ Display: Card 1 still shows but with status "idle" \(CORRECT\)
  
  IndexedDB:
    в”њв”Ђ persistSessionUpdate\(session\) called \(browserDb.js:166\)
    в”њв”Ђ session object has: { sessionId: "CLAUDE-ID-1", replacesId: "UUID-1", ... }
    в”њв”Ђ put\('sessions', { id: "CLAUDE-ID-1", status: "idle", ... }\)
    в”‚  в””в”Ђ Creates NEW record for "CLAUDE-ID-1"
    в”‚
    в”њв”Ђ вљ пёЏ  DOES NOT DELETE the old record "UUID-1" вљ пёЏ
    в”‚
    в””в”Ђ IndexedDB now has: { "UUID-1" \(orphaned!\), "CLAUDE-ID-1" }

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

T3: HOOK ARRIVES FROM CLAUDE \(2nd session\)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  Similar to T2:
  Backend:
    в””в”Ђ sessions.delete\("UUID-2"\)
    в””в”Ђ sessions.set\("CLAUDE-ID-2", reKeyedSession\)
  
  Frontend:
    в””в”Ђ Card 2 updated correctly
  
  IndexedDB:
    в”њв”Ђ put\('sessions', { id: "CLAUDE-ID-2", ... }\)
    в””в”Ђ IndexedDB now has: { "UUID-1", "CLAUDE-ID-1", "UUID-2", "CLAUDE-ID-2" }
       в””в”Ђ 2 orphaned pre-session records!

  Display: 2 cards \(correct, but IndexedDB is corrupt\)

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

T4: USER REFRESHES BROWSER
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  Frontend \(app.js\):
  
  STEP A: Load cached sessions \(before WS connects\)
  в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
    const cachedSessions = await getAll\('sessions'\)
    в†’ Returns: ["UUID-1", "CLAUDE-ID-1", "UUID-2", "CLAUDE-ID-2"]
    
    const liveSessions = cachedSessions.filter\(s => s.status !== 'ended'\)
    в†’ Returns: all 4 \(none ended\)
    
    for \(const cached of liveSessions\) {
      session = { sessionId: cached.id, ... }
      allSessions[session.sessionId] = session
      createOrUpdateCard\(session\)
    }
    
    allSessions after restore:
      {
        "UUID-1": { sessionId: "UUID-1", status: "connecting", ... },
        "CLAUDE-ID-1": { sessionId: "CLAUDE-ID-1", status: "idle", ... },
        "UUID-2": { sessionId: "UUID-2", status: "connecting", ... },
        "CLAUDE-ID-2": { sessionId: "CLAUDE-ID-2", status: "idle", ... },
      }
    
    Display at this point: 4 cards
                           в”њв”Ђ Card "UUID-1" \(connecting\)
                           в”њв”Ђ Card "CLAUDE-ID-1" \(idle\)
                           в”њв”Ђ Card "UUID-2" \(connecting\)
                           в””в”Ђ Card "CLAUDE-ID-2" \(idle\)
  
  STEP B: WebSocket connects в†’ Snapshot arrives
  в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
    Server sends: snapshot with sessions = getAllSessions\(\)
    
    getAllSessions\(\):
      for \(const [id, session] of sessions\) {
        if \(session.source === 'ssh'\) {
          result[id] = { ...session }
        }
      }
      
    Server memory at this point:
      sessions = {
        "CLAUDE-ID-1": { sessionId: "CLAUDE-ID-1", status: "idle", ... },
        "CLAUDE-ID-2": { sessionId: "CLAUDE-ID-2", status: "idle", ... },
      }
      
    Snapshot sent: { type: 'snapshot', sessions: { "CLAUDE-ID-1", "CLAUDE-ID-2" } }
    
    Frontend receives snapshot:
      for \(const [id, session] of Object.entries\(sessions\)\) {
        allSessions[id] = session  в†ђ Just overwrites
      }
      
    allSessions after snapshot merge:
      {
        "UUID-1": { sessionId: "UUID-1", status: "connecting", ... },    в†ђ STILL HERE!
        "CLAUDE-ID-1": { sessionId: "CLAUDE-ID-1", status: "idle", ... },
        "UUID-2": { sessionId: "UUID-2", status: "connecting", ... },    в†ђ STILL HERE!
        "CLAUDE-ID-2": { sessionId: "CLAUDE-ID-2", status: "idle", ... },
      }
  
  FINAL DISPLAY: 4 CARDS
  в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
    в”њв”Ђ Card 1: sessionId="UUID-1", status="connecting" \(DUPLICATE!\)
    в”њв”Ђ Card 2: sessionId="CLAUDE-ID-1", status="idle" \(correct\)
    в”њв”Ђ Card 3: sessionId="UUID-2", status="connecting" \(DUPLICATE!\)
    в””в”Ђ Card 4: sessionId="CLAUDE-ID-2", status="idle" \(correct\)

=============================================================================
PROBLEM SUMMARY
=============================================================================

The "replacesId" mechanism works PERFECTLY for the frontend runtime:
  вњ“ Old card is removed when new one arrives
  вњ“ User sees correct display

But IndexedDB persistence is broken:
  вњ— When persistSessionUpdate\(\) saves the rekey, it only writes the new record
  вњ— The old record \(UUID-1, UUID-2\) remains in IndexedDB
  вњ— On refresh, both old and new records are restored
  вњ— Snapshot merge doesn't dedupe, so duplicates persist

=============================================================================
ROOT CAUSES \(in order of responsibility\)
=============================================================================

1. browserDb.js:persistSessionUpdate\(\) \(60% responsibility\)
   - Writes new record but doesn't delete old record
   - Should: del\('sessions', session.replacesId\) if replacesId exists

2. app.js initial restore \(25% responsibility\)
   - Creates cards from ALL cached sessions without filtering
   - Should: Skip sessions where terminalId exists but sessionId != terminalId

3. app.js snapshot merge \(15% responsibility\)
   - Doesn't remove stale cached entries when snapshot arrives
   - Should: Delete from allSessions any entries not in snapshot

EOF)
